muscle.title: Muscle Mass Assessment
muscle.subtitle: Enter skeletal muscle mass (SMM). Calculates exterior-axis score.
muscle.smmHint: Uses weight, age, and sex from Home. Norm tables ~10–80; profile starts 13, max 80.
muscle.smmCeilingLine: Scoring SMM cap: {{max}} kg for your sex (male ~ Coleman-class; female ~ elite pro stage).

standardsInfo.p1: SMM is muscle mass from body-composition devices (BIA, scans). Enter device reading — no photo or height estimation here.
standardsInfo.p2: SM% = SMM ÷ body weight × 100 (Home weight). SMM and SM% answer different questions; both branches reduce one-sided readings.
standardsInfo.p3: Each branch scores against age/sex norm tables (0–100 decile anchors). Linear interpolation between anchors; damped extension above top anchor. Profile age 13–80 required.
standardsInfo.p4: Radar exterior axis = arithmetic mean of SMM score and SM% score. Preview matches saved value.
standardsInfo.p5: Max SMM input by sex (shown above) is a scoring guardrail, not medical judgment. Recheck device calibration if readings exceed cap.

muscle.submitDone: Saved — Home radar and merged scores use this exterior axis.
muscle.profileIncompleteHint: Complete Home profile (sex, age, height, weight) for muscle scoring.

errors.missing-profile: Complete physical profile on Home first.
errors.age-out-of-range: No muscle norm for this age (through 80). Check profile age.
errors.smm-exceeds-ceiling: SMM above model ceiling ({{max}} kg). Enter {{max}} kg or lower — recheck device if unexpected.
errors.standards-not-found: Could not resolve norm rows — verify age and sex on Home.
